arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk responds to Wayne Rooney calling him 'lazy' after Liverpool's defeat by PSG
arts.sum: Van Dijk was part of the Liverpool side beaten 1-0 at home on Tuesday night by PSG, who then won a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress to the quarter-finals of the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Stephen Kenny explains why PSG ace should inspire two of his young St Patrick’s Athletic stars
arts.sum: The St Patrick’s Athletic manager reckons midfielders Brandon Kavanagh and Barry Baggley have faced questions throughout their careers about their ability to play in the centre of the park. “I said to the players, particularly Barry Baggley and Brandon Kavanagh, because we've quite a small team, you won't get a smaller midfield probably anywhere in Europe, I said to them, take inspiration; Vitinha is not that tall,” Kenny revealed.

Quenda has already completed his medical after a secret visit and is set to join Chelsea in 2026.
